capabilities_used.evidence: 2024-08-31: "@Grayscale - Unloaded > $1.3B worth of $ETH since early July"。配图里也直接用了 Grayscale/Coinbase Prime 地址余额下滑和入所记录，明显把大额入所/抛压当作交易框架。
2024-01-31: "@Grayscale contributed to almost $8b worth of $BTC etf outflows sending $BTC from $43k to $38k. $BTC flows are getting healthier every single hour"。他会把 ETF/机构资金流当成价格驱动。
AR/USDT 图上用紫色大箱体明确标出约 23-48 区间，属于典型箱体高低点交易思路；2025-05-29 也说过 "Observing if $LAUNCHCOIN can hold this range"。
AR 图不是趋势线或均线系统，而是先做市场状态分类，把币看成中期震荡箱体；这说明他先识别 regime，再决定是等突破还是在区间内部处理。
2025-04-30: "$FARTCOIN, $VIRTUAL and $AI16Z peaked out locally but all of you are too delusional and bullish to take profits"。VIRTUAL 图也呈现近乎垂直拉升后的高位震荡，符合抛物线衰竭识别。
2025-03-31: "Charts look absolutely horrendous right now, supports breaking everywhere"；2025-06-29: "Sell every $SOL pump"。他会明确切到下行/弱势 regime，而不是无条件做多。
2025-07-30: "Learn to add to your winners"；2025-05-29: "Actually can’t stop winning on $SPX"。SPX 图也是沿趋势持有而非频繁反手，说明他在强趋势里偏顺势加仓。
2024-07-28: "The rotation from $SOL memes -> $SOL's ecosystem is inevitable"；2024-06-30 又列 Q4 回归叙事。虽然没直接说 BTC.D，但他持续做链间/板块间资金轮动框架。
2026-01-15: "weak CPI + Iran war fears pushed down the equities market a lot while $BTC recovered"。他会把宏观风险偏好和加密相对强弱放在同一判断里。
2025-03-28: "We actually have 234 different stablecoins now with $234B in total MC"。他会把稳定币体量、份额和扩张看成赛道机会与流动性背景。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: VC Unlock Overhang Fade
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: VC 解锁抛压做空/回避
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Avoid or fade tokens with high FDV, low float, aggressive cliffs, and large investor unrealized multiples because unlock schedules create persistent sell pressure.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 对高 FDV、低流通、悬崖解锁明显、投资人浮盈倍数极高的代币保持回避或逢高做空，因为后续解锁会形成持续抛压。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-08-26: "VCs don't actually lose even when they are locked up with vesting cliffs. Many of them short their own investments..."；2025-04-28 做空 $TRUMP 的核心论据也是大额线性解锁；配图中还有专门的 vesting / investor supply / unrealized profit 表。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Mindshare Momentum
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track social attention, Kaito rankings, and narrative share-of-voice as leading indicators for token rotation and meme/AI beta selection.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用社交关注度、Kaito 排名和叙事声量作为板块轮动与 meme/AI 标的筛选的领先指标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-06-29: "Mira @miranetwork ‘s Kaito leaderboard is absolutely worth climbing"；2024-11-16 评价 $GOAT 时把 "Mindshare moat" 列为第一条；配图也直接用了 Kaito Yaps 排行。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: PMF and Revenue Repricing
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Re-rate tokens that show real product-market fit, durable revenue, user growth, or buyback engines even if the broader market narrative is noisy.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 对拥有真实产品市场契合、持续收入、用户增长或回购机制的代币进行重估，即使市场噪音很大。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-29: "This bull cycle we have 3 products so far that have achieved product market fit"；2025-05-27 论证 $SYRUP 时列 TVL、年化收入、stablecoin mc 增长；2025-09-28 强调 $APEX 的 buyback pressure。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Ecosystem Rotation Betas
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 生态轮动 Beta 下注
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When a chain or narrative regains attention, rotate from the obvious leaders into liquid beta names and second-order ecosystem plays.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当某条链或某个叙事重新获得关注时，从龙头扩散到流动性更好的 beta 标的和二级生态标的。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-29 看多 "$SOL alts"；2024-07-28 明说 "rotation from $SOL memes -> $SOL's ecosystem is inevitable"；2025 年又多次把 Base 叙事集中到 $ZORA。

personal_quirks.quote: Friendly reminder to instantly dump any L2 airdrop for $ETH
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把高抛压、低质量代币的空头或回避逻辑，直接转换成更强资产的相对价值多头。

personal_quirks.quote: No one wants to hear it but 99% of these overhyped VC projects will die in the next 2 years.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认对高估值 VC 币持怀疑态度，除非有极强产品和需求证明其能活下来。

personal_quirks.quote: Don’t bother finding any play other than $ZORA. Learn to add to your winners.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 强趋势里不分散注意力，集中火力加到已验证的赢家上。

personal_quirks.quote: $FARTCOIN, $VIRTUAL and $AI16Z peaked out locally but all of you are too delusional and bullish to take profits.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 情绪过热时主动兑现，不把局部高潮误判成永续趋势。

personal_quirks.quote: Crypto is no longer the best industry to turn zero to 1m anymore
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他对行业 alpha 衰减有明确认知，选币更重结构性优势而不是无脑博弈整体行业 beta。

unique_traits: 他不是纯 K 线派，真正的 edge 来自把简单结构图和链上/ETF 资金流、VC 解锁、mindshare、PMF/收入数据绑在一起。相比常见 TA 交易员，他更像做“叙事+结构+筹码/供给”混合交易，图表通常只负责给出箱体、趋势或局部见顶位置，而核心判断来自谁在卖、谁有回购、谁有用户、谁在被市场讨论。

high_conviction_phrases: the only token that can possibly rival
don’t bother finding any play other than
